case_title: SHANE MAYER-FELDBERG et al VS. MODTIMBER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-16-2013 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MAYER-FELDBERG, SHANE QUINTANA, JOHN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-16-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-16-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY FRANC ZAMUDIO--OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAYER-FELDBERG, SHANE QUINTANA, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MODTIMBER $450.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $450.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,370.00 FILED BY MAYER-FELDBERG, SHANE QUINTANA, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT MODTIMBER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED MAR-01-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MODTIMBER
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MODTIMBER
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER *(SC-108)* FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYER-FELDBERG, SHANE QUINTANA, JOHN

ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFFS' IS "DENIED". (EXPLANATION FOR DECISION: AN ORDER FOR PLAINTIFFS' COSTS WAS NOT MADE BECAUSE PLAINITFFS REPEATEDLY REFUSED TO ACCEPT A REFUND FROM DEFENDANTS' WHICH SHOULD HAVE RESOLVED THIS MATTER.) - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
